narrative:
West Chester Twp township has 42,905 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.2 percentage points.
